events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes loop checks & wiring work that is rough-complete, with a defect: missing surge protection on field side. This is a non-compliance issue. The work is about 70% complete until defects are corrected.

Let me assess:
- Decision: fail (non-compliant - missing surge protection)
- Risk: medium (surge protection missing could damage equipment)
- Work stage: rough-complete
- Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
- Percent complete: 70
- Findings: missing surge protection on field side
- Actions: install surge protection on field side, re-perform loop check after correction
- References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1
